name: Athenahealth, Inc.
lede: Athena runs three centers across three Indian cities. Bengaluru, Chennai and Pune, covering R&D, built over thirteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Athena office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Athenahealth, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Athena runs 3 verified centers across 3 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Chennai, Pune), covering R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: Director - Talent and Culture (US and India)

about.description: Athena's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Chennai and Pune, spanning R&D. The centers deliver IT, HR and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 27 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Athena operate in India?
faq.a: Athena operates 3 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Athena have centers in?
faq.a: Athena's India footprint includes Bengaluru and 2 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Athena run in India?
faq.a: Athena runs R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Athena's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Athena's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Athena's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Athena's India centers, across IT and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
